cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-01: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY created_by_department per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect (width = 50 if distinct count > 500, 20 if > 200, else 10); leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-02: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY guest_related per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect (width = 50 if distinct count > 500, 20 if > 200, else 10); leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-03: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, job_status (stacked); AVG(resolution_hours) BY hotel_code (line) WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-04: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY escalation_level, then TOP defect WITHIN escalation_level WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-05: open_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-06: Country Value = SUM(total_orders) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, total_orders) list per country WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-07: COUNT(*) guest_related vs non_guest_related BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-08: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY (is_overdue ? Delayed : On Time) per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-09: COUNT(*) BY duration_bucket WHERE type = MO DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY hotel_code WITHIN bucket
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-10: COUNT(*) BY HOUR(created_datetime) WHERE type = MO DRILLDOWN COUNT(*) BY hotel_code WITHIN hour
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-11: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY escalation_level per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect (width = 50 if distinct count > 500, 20 if > 200, else 10); leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-12: COUNT(*) BY defect_or_asset WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-13: Level 2 = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY completed_by per hotel (width = 50 if distinct count > 500, 20 if > 200, else 10); Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect WITHIN technician; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-14: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY category per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect (width = 50 if distinct count > 500, 20 if > 200, else 10); leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-15: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY created_by_department per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-16: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY guest_related per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-17: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY (is_overdue ? Delayed : On Time) per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-18: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY type per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO OR type = PM
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-19: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY completed_duration_bucket per hotel (duration = completed_datetime - created_datetime in hours, 0 when not yet Completed); Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours), Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-20: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY HOUR(created_datetime) per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-21: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY escalation_level per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
cmo_chart_formulas.cmo-22: Level 2 = COUNT(jobs) GROUP BY job_status per hotel; Defect Dist = rank-ranges of COUNT(jobs) BY defect; leaf = COUNT(jobs), AVG(completed_hours) [0 when not yet Completed], Delay Rate = overdue jobs / COUNT * 100 WHERE type = MO
